summary: The active session divergence is rustfmt-only noise in request deadlines, polling returns, loop breaks, and test exits; no session behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 166: M	crates/net/network/src/session/active.rs.

The isolated patch adds semicolons and expression wrapping in pooled-transaction hash validation, request deadline arithmetic, protocol-breach timeout handling, terminate-message polling, disconnect polling, receive/send loops, queue-capacity checks, and a test loop.
